description: A notification indicates that a backhoe is due for its 250-hour service. The site manager must schedule this maintenance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms receipt of the maintenance alert.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a service appointment with the equipment dealer for the end of the week.
Block out 'Backhoe #1' as unavailable in the resource schedule for the day of the service.

expected_outcome.value: The equipment schedule is updated to prevent booking conflicts.
